reviews.review_description: I started playing this game with my daughter coop and we have a lot of fun not too scary for her but still a fun spooky game . I saw different game modes on there that I haven’t tried yet like zombies,werewolf ,ghost, and many more . This game needs more Attention. I love it
The problems that the first game had translate to this one as well. The inventory operates better though, I'll give credit for that. I haven't bothered finishing this one, maybe I'll come back to it.
I love the game its fun I like the jump  scares 😱 😨 and it's fun game to play
